summary_en: 1,741,600 shares acquired May 1–21, 2026 for ¥6.52B via open market. Cumulative: 8,437,000 shares (post-split adjusted) for ¥30.0B, consuming 100% of ¥30.0B authorization ceiling. Program terminated May 2026.
title_en: Notification Regarding Share Acquisition Status and Completion of Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Canon Marketing Japan completed a share buyback on May 21, 2026. During the final execution window (May 1–21, 2026), the company acquired 1,741,600 shares on the Tokyo Stock Exchange at a total cost of ¥6.52 billion. This concludes the buyback program authorized by the Board on January 28, 2026. Cumulatively, the company has acquired 8,437,000 shares (adjusted for the April 1, 2026 stock split) for ¥30.0 billion, fully consuming the ¥30.0 billion upper limit and the revised 10,000,000-share ceiling (post-split). The buyback was executed via open-market purchase on the TSE.
